description.hr: UI/UX Poliranje - dodana BackToTop komponenta, hibridna desktop/mobile navigacija, animirani dropdown i ažurirani social linkovi.
description.en: UI/UX Polishing - added BackToTop component, hybrid desktop/mobile navigation, animated dropdown and updated social links.

description.hr: Veliki Redizajn 2026 - novi vizualni identitet (papirnata tekstura), dinamičke teme po vinima, pauk grafikoni i SEO /wine/ rute.
description.en: Major Redesign 2026 - new visual identity (paper texture), dynamic wine themes, spider graphs and SEO /wine/ routes.
